title: Add demo run sandbox
goal: Add `jcode-harness demo run --sandbox` so project-writing issue #2 demos can execute in a temporary isolated workspace without mutating the requested cwd.
requiredInputs: Existing demo run block-by-default safety policy
completionConditions: `demo run all --sandbox --json` executes all 8 demos with status ok
Sandbox reports path/cleanup/retained metadata and removes the directory by default
Each result reports `executed_root` equal to the sandbox path
Requested cwd is not mutated by sandboxed project-writing demos
Focused e2e, cargo check, selfdev jcode, and selfdev jcode-harness validations pass
verificationCommands: cargo run -q -p jcode --bin jcode-harness -- demo run all --sandbox --json
notes: Sandbox mode creates a temp execution root, builds the manifest against it, runs demos there, renders JSON, and removes the sandbox unless --keep-sandbox is set.
